description.p: 1984 is a cycle-stepped Amstrad CPC 464/6128 emulator written in C with SDL3. The core machine — Z80 CPU, MC6845 CRTC, AY-3-8912 PSG, uPD765 FDC, Gate Array, keyboard, joystick/gamepad and cassette tape — runs commercial games and standard software at full speed.

ul.li: DS12887 real-time clock (Cyboard / SYMBiFACE II compatible)
SYMBiFACE II / Cyboard IDE (raw disk images, FAT16/FAT32)
Albireo USB host (CH376) for UNIDOS and SymbOS

description.p: New Monochrome display tint (off / green / amber / white) under Advanced — emulates a period GT65 green-phosphor monitor (and amber / paper-white variants) by mapping the CPC hardware palette through a Rec. 601 luma transform at ink-resolve time; border tints with the inks (#158). 1984(1) man page shipped and installed under $mandir/man1 (#159). Activity LED bar now has a 1.5× wide 3-segment M4 indicator (power / disk / net) and a documented slot map at docs/LEDS.md (#154, #156). FUZIX over Net4CPC works end-to-end after fixing the W5100S handshake, auto-assigned source port, Sn_IR clear, and chip-wide IR summary (#150); ephemeral port is now randomized per process so reconnects don't loop on challenge-ACK (#153). M4 board implements C_ROMLOW (0x433D) so FUZIX v2.0.7+ detects it (#151). SDCC .map files can now be imported into the F8 monitor with --symbols, including per-bank scoping for FUZIX (#152). New USIfAC II RS232 emulation (closes #36) (#148). Scripted joystick driver + headless capture for automated UI tests (#149). 664 ROMs (OS_664, BASIC_664, AMSDOS_664) are now shipped in the RPM, and `make dist` produces a buildable tarball.

Closes the residual HDCPM / CP/M+ cold-reset race (#129): the Gate Array now acknowledges its 300 Hz interrupt before the Z80's interrupt-entry cycles advance the bus, matching Caprice32 / konCePCja and reaching 13/13 PASS on the canonical |hdcpm arrival-frame sweep with Net4CPC disabled. Net4CPC gains IPRAW socket mode so PING.COM works end-to-end, a brief ARP retry on miss before reporting failure, the PHYSR0 register alias / W5100S-correct default, and a full silicon-defaults reset on MR.RST. Z80 cycle accuracy: IM1=20 / IM2=28 plus a complete iWSAdjust pipeline-hint set (LDIR/LDDR, LD A,I/R, DD/FD INC/DEC and RET cc not-taken), and OUT (n),A now splits into pre-IO tick and post-IO settle so peripherals see the correct mid-instruction bus phase.

Renderer perf: cached resolved inks + precomputed pen tables collapse the per-pixel scalar work in render_char to a flat 16-pixel write, freeing meaningful frame headroom on slower hardware. Video capture: F6 records a GIF (in-tree encoder, no extra dependencies) and Overlay → Capture video saves WebM/VP9 via ffmpeg when available. Snapshot load/save with .sna v1-v3 support. Net4CPC gains a one-click TAP backend on Linux with built-in DHCP server, DNS proxy and NAT, plus an if_tap backend on FreeBSD / NetBSD / OpenBSD. Per-board ROM groupings: ROMs follow the M4 / Albireo / Cyboard toggle automatically. Stability: konCePCja cc_op cycle-table port fixes the HDCPM / CP/M+ kernel-ISR bank-save/restore race, plus several segfault hazards in the file-dialog callback, video capture, FDC and snapshot paths.

HDCPM / CP/M+ boots fully to the A0:CPM> prompt from FAT-formatted SYMBiFACE II / Cyboard IDE drives, mounting up to four CPMDSKxx.IMG images. SymbOS desktop runs on both Albireo (CH376 USB) and Cyboard (Net4CPC + RTC + SYMBiFACE IDE). Two CPU/interrupt fixes underneath: the Gate Array IRQ acknowledge is now deferred until the Z80 actually accepts the maskable interrupt (so the 300 Hz IRQ cadence stays stable across IFF1-masked sections), and RETI restores IFF1 from IFF2 like Caprice32 / WinAPE / MAME.
Cassette tape support (.cdt/TZX) with loading screech mixed into PSG audio; fullscreen letterbox gutter colour fix.
